For Alzheimer's disease and related disorders or senile dementia, beneficiaries must have at least one 
inpatient, SNF, home health, Part B institutional, or Part B non-institutional (carrier) claim with a 
related code in any position during the three-year reference period. 

The CCW’s criteria were developed after reviewing validated algorithms from the research literature
